name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
setup: Sit on bench with back support (or standing)
Hold dumbbells at shoulder height, palms forward
Elbows below wrists, slightly in front of body
execution: Press dumbbells overhead in arc until arms extended
Dumbbells come close together at top (don't clang)
common_mistakes: Dumbbells too wide at top (shoulder impingement)
Partial reps (not going to full extension)
cues: Press in an arc, not straight up
Elbows slightly in front at bottom
advantages: More natural shoulder tracking than barbell
Can go slightly heavier without spine loading
